title: Leia (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Defiance_EaW.png|thumb|right|250px|Princess Leia Organa]]
'''Leia''' could refer to any of the following individuals:

==Canon==
*'''[[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]]''', the [[princess]] of [[Alderaan]], a leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and the [[General]] of the [[Resistance]].
**[[Leia's bedroom|Leia Organa's bedroom]]
**[[Leia Organa's Day of Demand]]
**[[Leia Organa's doll]]
**[[Leia Organa's home]]
**[[Leia Organa's keepsake chest]]
**[[Leia's lightsaber]]
**[[Leia's office]]
**[[Leia Organa's quarters]]
**[[Leia Organa's ship]]
**[[Leia Organa's signet ring]]
**[[Leia Organa's silver headband]]
**[[Leia Organa's sparring partner ]]
**[[Leia Organa's wedding dress]]

==Legends==
*'[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|''Leia Organa Solo''']], the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] version of the above character
**[[Leia's lightsaber/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's lightsabers]]
**[[Leia Organa Solo's memoir]]
**[[Leia Organa's office]]
**[[Leia Organa's shuttle]]
**[[Leia Organa's space cruiser]]
*[[Leia (character)|Leia]], a character who appeared in the play ''[[Two Jedi Men From Baronis]]''
*[[Leia d'al' Gargan]], a [[Musician/Legends|musician]] who was named after Leia Organa Solo
*[[Leia Organa II]], a [[Human replica droid]] made in the image of Leia Organa Solo
*[[Leia biot]], a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Biot]]

==Non-canon==
*[[Leia (The Star Wars)|Leia]], a 14-year-old princess from [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]]

==Out of universe==
===Canon media===
====Novels====
*'''''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan]]''''' {{C|[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the novel by [[Claudia Gray]]
**'''''[[Leia Organa: Ordeal of the Princess]]''''' {{C|[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 1|Vol. 1]]) ([[Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 2|Vol. 2]]}}, Japanese webcomic adaptation by [[Haruichi]]
*'''''[[Moving Target: A Princess Leia Adventure]]''''' {{C|[[Moving Target: A Princess Leia Adventure (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, a junior novel by [[Cecil Castellucci]] and [[Jason Fry]]

====Young readers====
*'''''[[Leia and the Great Island Escape]]''''', a young readers book which adapts ''Moving Target''
*'''''[[Leia Organa: Rebel Leader]]''''', a book by [[Chronicle Books]]
*'''''[[Princess Leia: Royal Rebel]]''''', a young readers reference book by [[Scholastic]]
*'''''[[This is Leia]]''''', a [[World of Reading]] book by [[Disney–Lucasfilm Press]]

====Short stories====
*'''''[[Leia Charts Her Own Course]]''''', a short story in the [[Galactic Adventures Storybook Collection]] by [[Liz Marsham]]
*'''''[[Leia and the Ewoks]]''''', a short story published in [[The Original Trilogy Stories]] by [[Meredith Rusu]]

====Episodes====
*'''''[[Princess Leia vs. Darth Vader - A Fearless Leader]]''''', the seventh  episode of [[Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures]]
*'''''[[Princess Leia – The Rescue]]''''', the fourteenth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Princess Leia - An Unexpected Friend]]''''', the twenty-fourth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Leia and Han - The Han Rescue]]''''', the twenty-fifth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures
*'''''[[Leia Organa - A Princess, A General, A Mentor]]''''', the fortieth episode of Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures

====Comics====
*'''''[[Star Wars: Princess Leia]]''''' {{C|[[Star Wars: Princess Leia (trade paperback)|TPB]]}}, a [[Marvel Comics]] miniseries written by [[Mark Waid]]
*'''''[[Hyperspace Stories: Princess Leia]]''''', a graphic novel by [[Dark Horse Comics]]

====Reference====
*'''[[Princess Leia Organa (reference book)|''Princess Leia Organa'']]''', an issue of the [[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'']]

===Legends media===
*'''''[[Leia's Trust]]''''', a comic story in [[Star Wars Comic|''Star Wars'' Comic]]
*'''''[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]''''', a comic strip by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]]
*'''''[[The Princess Leia Diaries]]''''', a comic published in ''[[Star Wars Tales 11]]'' by [[Jason Hall]]
*'''''[[Princess Leia: Rebel Leader]]''''', a children's books published by [[Golden Books]]
*'''''[[Introducing Princess Leia]]''''', a children's book published by [[Reed Children's Books]]
*'''''[[Leia: Princess of the People]]''''', an article in published in ''[[Star Wars Insider 144]]'' by [[Tricia Barr]]

===Other===
*"'''[[Princess Leia's Theme]]'''," the musical [[Wikipedia:leitmotif|leitmotif]].

===Board games===
*'''''[[Leia Organa Ally Pack]]''''', the ninth Ally Pack for [[Star Wars: Imperial Assault]]
*'''''[[Leia Organa Commander Expansion]]''''', an expansion to [[Star Wars: Legion]]
